description: Deepen agent-swarm, voice-first-os, and data-warehouse packages from skeletons to full implementations with comprehensive tests (30+, 30+, 20+ tests respectively). These are the highest priority packages.
steps: AGENT-SWARM (packages/agent-swarm/src/) - Expand from 4 tests to 30+:
1. Extend types.ts: add MessageBusEvent, RetryConfig, ObservationHook, ConflictResolution types. Add goal states 'retrying'|'paused'. Add SwarmMessage type with topic/payload/sender/timestamp.

2. Create src/bus/message-bus.ts: In-memory NATS-like pub/sub message bus. Topics, subscriptions, wildcard matching, message history, delivery guarantees (at-least-once via ack). Methods: publish(topic, payload), subscribe(topic, handler), unsubscribe, getHistory(topic).

3. Enhance src/scratchpad/shared-scratchpad.ts: Add conflict resolution (last-writer-wins, merge-function). Add locking (optimistic locking with version numbers). Add snapshot/restore. Add diff between versions.
4. Enhance src/budget/swarm-budget.ts: Add per-subgoal budget allocation. Add budget alerts/callbacks at thresholds. Add budget transfer between goals. Add budget history/audit.

5. Enhance src/orchestrator/swarm-orchestrator.ts: Add retry with exponential backoff (configurable max retries, backoff factor). Add goal dependencies (one goal blocks on another). Add priority queue for sub-goals. Add failSubGoal method. Add goal cancellation. Add observation hooks (onStateChange, onProgress, onBudgetAlert).
6. Enhance src/audit/swarm-audit.ts: Add severity levels. Add structured detail (not just string). Add time-range queries. Add audit export. Add audit retention policy.
7. Update src/index.ts to export all new modules (MessageBus).

8. Rewrite src/__tests__/agent-swarm.test.ts as comprehensive test suite with 30+ tests covering: orchestrator lifecycle, retry/backoff, dependencies, priorities, cancellation, observation hooks, budget enforcement/allocation/transfer/alerts, message bus pub/sub/wildcards/ack, scratchpad conflicts/locking/snapshots, audit severity/timerange/export.
VOICE-FIRST-OS (packages/voice-first-os/src/) - Expand from 3 tests to 30+:
9. Extend types.ts: Add WakeWordState, PrivacyConfig, PhoneFreeConfig, ContextTransition types. Expand AmbientContext to include confidence thresholds and behavior rules per context.

10. Create src/wake-word/wake-word-state-machine.ts: States (idle, listening, confirming, active, cooldown). Transitions with confidence thresholds. False-positive suppression. Timeout back to idle. History of activations.
11. Create src/privacy/privacy-controller.ts: Manage recording consent, data retention limits, what gets stored/transmitted. Privacy lamp state. Mute zones. Per-app voice permissions.
12. Create src/phone-free/phone-free-controller.ts: Screen-off voice mode. Manage which commands allowed in phone-free. Route audio output (speaker/bluetooth/watch). Session timeout.

13. Enhance src/commands/command-registry.ts: Add command execution with result types. Add command aliases. Add fuzzy matching for mis-heard commands. Add context-aware command filtering (some commands only in driving mode). Add command history/undo.

14. Enhance src/mode/voice-first-mode.ts: Add notification priority routing (which notifications read aloud vs silent). Add do-not-disturb integration. Add voice feedback level (verbose/terse/silent).
15. Enhance src/elder/elder-mode.ts: Add medication reminders. Add daily check-in schedule. Add simplified command subset. Add family activity log.
16. Update src/index.ts to export WakeWordStateMachine, PrivacyController, PhoneFreeController.

17. Rewrite src/__tests__/voice-first-os.test.ts with 30+ tests: wake-word state transitions, privacy controls, phone-free mode, command fuzzy matching, context-aware filtering, elder mode features, notification routing, command execution/undo.
DATA-WAREHOUSE (packages/data-warehouse/src/) - Expand from 3 tests to 20+:
18. Extend types.ts: Add SQL-like query AST types (SelectQuery, WhereClause, AggregateFunction). Add TimeSeriesPoint, DataInspectorResult, ColumnSchema types. Add CSV/Parquet as ExportFormats.

19. Enhance src/query/nl-query.ts: Real NL-to-SQL translation pipeline. Parse intents (count, sum, avg, max, min, list). Parse time expressions (last 7 days, this month, between dates). Parse filters (from app X, by user Y). Build structured query AST. Execute against in-memory data store.

20. Create src/storage/time-series-store.ts: In-memory columnar store for activity data. Append events with timestamp/app/action/metadata. Query by time range, app, action. Aggregations (count per day, sum per week). Downsampling for large ranges.

21. Enhance src/export/data-exporter.ts: Add CSV export (proper escaping, headers). Add Parquet-like structured export (JSON-based columnar format). Add streaming export for large datasets. Add export progress tracking. Add export scheduling.

22. Enhance src/residency/data-residency.ts: Add data movement between regions. Add residency policy enforcement (block writes to wrong region). Add data location inspector (show exactly where each record lives). Add compliance report generation.

23. Create src/inspector/data-inspector.ts: 'Where is my data' feature. For a given user, show all data locations, sizes, retention ages, encryption status. Show data flow map (which services have copies).
24. Update src/index.ts to export TimeSeriesStore, DataInspector.

25. Rewrite src/__tests__/data-warehouse.test.ts with 20+ tests: NL parsing (various intents, time expressions, filters), query execution, time-series store (append, query, aggregate, downsample), export formats (JSON/CSV), residency enforcement, data inspector, error cases.
acceptance_criteria: agent-swarm has 30+ passing tests covering orchestrator, bus, budget, scratchpad, audit
voice-first-os has 30+ passing tests covering commands, wake-word, privacy, phone-free, elder mode
data-warehouse has 20+ passing tests covering NL query, time-series, export, residency, inspector
pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/agent-swarm passes with zero errors
pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/voice-first-os passes with zero errors
pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/data-warehouse passes with zero errors
All three packages build successfully (pnpm build --filter=PACKAGE)
All new modules exported from index.ts
findings: All 3 packages deepened successfully. agent-swarm: 43 tests (30+ required), voice-first-os: 50 tests (30+ required), data-warehouse: 36 tests (20+ required). All typecheck, build, and test pass. Prettier ran via lint-staged on commit.
